content.description: Full content to write or append

target.description: Where to write: 'memory' for MEMORY.md, 'daily_log' for today's log, 'heartbeat' for HEARTBEAT.md checklist, 'bootstrap' to clear BOOTSTRAP.md (content is ignored; the file is always cleared), or a relative memory document path.

append.description: Append to existing content when true; replace when false

metadata.description: Optional document metadata such as skip_indexing or skip_versioning

old_string.description: Exact text to replace; switches to patch mode

replace_all.description: Replace every old_string occurrence in patch mode

timezone.description: IANA timezone used only for daily_log target date resolution
